Carer Checklist.summary: Prepare-to-claim checklist for Carer Payment. Four sections, twelve items, per-section requiredCount readiness model. Content in carer-checklist.ts; UI in components/checklist/.

Check Flow Pages.summary: Six-question Parenting Payment eligibility check. Routes q1-q6 each render QuestionPage. Results at check/result/eligible and check/result/ineligible. Flow state held in FlowProvider context.

Component Library.summary: Reusable UI primitives and layout components. Built with Base UI React (@base-ui/react), class-variance-authority, and Tailwind CSS v4.

Design System Reference.summary: Design system reference page at /components. Every component in every state, with accessibility and design notes. Deliberate portfolio artifact — not a debug page.

Eligibility Logic.summary: Parenting Payment eligibility engine. evaluate(answers) is a pure function returning eligible, ineligible (with reason: residency | child-age | income), or null. Branch table documented in eligibility.ts header. Smoke test in bin/test-eligibility.ts.

Multi-step Flow.summary: FlowProvider: React context + useReducer scoped to the /check layout. Holds answers across question page navigations. Reset action clears all answers.

Navigation System.summary: Side-rail sibling lists (familyPayments, carerPayments) and nav components. Most sibling links are href='#' stubs — only the two primary scenario pages are routed.

conventions.Component Composition Pattern: Base UI React primitives for all interactive components (radio groups, disclosure, buttons). No ShadCN. Lucide React for icons. class-variance-authority for variant-driven button APIs.
conventions.CSS Architecture: Three layers in globals.css: Layer 1 = Attica raw tokens in :root; Layer 2 = html[data-theme='sa'] SA navy theme mapping raws to ShadCN semantic names; Layer 3 = @theme inline Tailwind bridge.
conventions.Logic-UI Separation: Business logic isolated in src/lib/ (eligibility.ts, questions.ts, carer-checklist.ts); UI components consume via imports. Pure functions only — no side effects in lib/.
conventions.Next.js App Directory Structure: Next.js App Router with TypeScript strict. src/ contains app/, components/, and lib/. Server Components by default; client components marked with 'use client'.
conventions.Utility-First Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 with @tailwindcss/postcss. @theme inline bridge (not v3 config file). Utilities composed via clsx and tailwind-merge.

gotchas.Tailwind v4 API: Uses @tailwindcss/postcss and @theme inline — not the v3 tailwind.config.js pattern. Consult node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for any Next.js API that may differ from training data.
gotchas.No persistence: Eligibility flow answers are in-memory React context (FlowProvider). Checklist state is local useState. Both reset on page refresh — intentional per the brief.
gotchas.Base UI not ShadCN: Components use @base-ui/react primitives directly, not ShadCN wrappers. API differs from standard Radix UI: no asChild prop, data attributes differ.
gotchas.SA means Services Australia: SA in this project refers to Services Australia (the federal agency), not South Australia. The theme is 'sa' (Services Australia navy #1B4F72), not a state government theme.
